method.name: connected_sheets_carry_forward_review_packet
method.decision_policy: Group carry-forward queues into reviewer decision lanes. Do not accept grouping, formula, version, metric, semantic, or shared ontology claims.

review_lanes.title: Document Item Grouping
review_lanes.description: Structural grouping exists, but only formula/dataflow-backed groups are accepted.

decision_items.question: Which section/text/table groupings should be accepted, split, or rejected before semantic storage?
decision_items.impact: Accepted groups become the structural units consumed by semantic iteration.
decision_items.recommended_next_action: Review representative section groups first, then decide whether ordering-only groups need visual capture or can stay review-required.

sample_items.label: B. 월간 비용 관리 (마케팅비 및 강사료)
B. 월간 비용 관리 (마케팅비 및 강사료)
B. 월간 비용 관리 (마케팅비 및 강사료)
B. 월간 비용 관리 (마케팅비 및 강사료)
C. 주간 신규 런칭 타율 및 주간 매출
B. 월간 비용 관리 (마케팅비 및 강사료)
C. 주간 신규 런칭 타율 및 주간 매출
B. 월간 비용 관리 (마케팅비 및 강사료)
C. 주간 신규 런칭 타율 및 주간 매출

decision_items.question: Which FC_DATA-dependent formula pipeline groups can be accepted after formula-result authority is resolved?
decision_items.impact: These groups should not become semantic report surfaces until output authority is available.
decision_items.recommended_next_action: Resolve formula-result authority first; then re-run grouping acceptance for blocked pipeline groups.

decision_items.question: Which chart/image/object surfaces belong to which table or section?
decision_items.impact: Object anchors can change human-perceived document hierarchy.
decision_items.recommended_next_action: Resolve precise object anchors/source ranges or leave coarse object surfaces orphaned.

review_lanes.title: Formula Result Authority
review_lanes.description: FC_DATA and FC_DATA-dependent report outputs remain the strongest blockers.

decision_items.question: Should FC_DATA effective errors be treated as source data defects, expected blanks/errors, or blockers for all downstream reports?
decision_items.impact: This determines whether FC_DATA-dependent report surfaces can be accepted or must remain blocked.
decision_items.recommended_next_action: Inspect current/source FC_DATA error cells and decide whether they are acceptable diagnostics or data defects to reconcile.

error.message: Cannot find range or sheet for imported range.
Function DIVIDE parameter 2 cannot be zero.
Function DIVIDE parameter 2 cannot be zero.

decision_items.question: Which blocked report output ranges should receive targeted effective-value probes next?
decision_items.impact: Targeted probes can move report pipelines from blocked to accepted/review-required formula authority.
decision_items.recommended_next_action: Probe representative FC_DATA-dependent report outputs by version group before probing every tab.

review_lanes.title: Metric Equivalence
review_lanes.description: Visible metric labels need scoped equivalence decisions before semantic storage.

decision_items.question: Can visible visible_net_revenue_or_refund_adjusted_label surfaces be treated as the same 결제액 metric, or should they be scoped variants?
decision_items.impact: This prevents 매출/순매출/결제액 labels from collapsing into one misleading ontology concept.
decision_items.recommended_next_action: Compare basis, refund treatment, period axis, filters, aggregation, lineage, role, and formula authority.

decision_items.question: Can visible visible_revenue_label surfaces be treated as the same 결제액 metric, or should they be scoped variants?
decision_items.impact: This prevents 매출/순매출/결제액 labels from collapsing into one misleading ontology concept.
decision_items.recommended_next_action: Compare basis, refund treatment, period axis, filters, aggregation, lineage, role, and formula authority.

decision_items.question: Can visible visible_payment_label surfaces be treated as the same 결제액 metric, or should they be scoped variants?
decision_items.impact: This prevents 매출/순매출/결제액 labels from collapsing into one misleading ontology concept.
decision_items.recommended_next_action: Compare basis, refund treatment, period axis, filters, aggregation, lineage, role, and formula authority.

review_lanes.title: Version Breakpoints
review_lanes.description: Most version evidence is usable, but weak breakpoints should not drive promotion yet.

decision_items.question: Should review-required version groups be split further before repeated evidence is used?
decision_items.impact: Version groups define which tabs may count as repeated-family evidence.
decision_items.recommended_next_action: Inspect groups with formula/grouping drift and split only where layout meaning changes.

decision_items.question: Are column-count-only breakpoints real format/organization version changes or noise?
decision_items.impact: Weak breakpoints should not support shared ontology promotion until accepted.
decision_items.recommended_next_action: Review weak breakpoints after grouping/metric decisions; merge or accept them based on visible layout changes.

decision_items.question: Which section/text/table groupings should be accepted, split, or rejected before semantic storage?
decision_items.impact: Accepted groups become the structural units consumed by semantic iteration.
decision_items.recommended_next_action: Review representative section groups first, then decide whether ordering-only groups need visual capture or can stay review-required.

parser_observations.message: Carry-forward review packet groups existing review queues and does not create parser truth.
Formula authority and metric equivalence are high-priority blockers for semantic storage.
4 review lanes are ready for human feedback in the HTML viewer.
